text:
- Update to 0.5.7.
- Stage-ify.
- Move away from deprecated bsd.python.mk variables and generate the plist
  automatically.
- I see that many updates to this port have been committed after a long
  period of maintainer timeout; I can take maintanership of this port if OK.

Port maintainer (flz@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
